message:
fix: resolve clippy large_futures warnings and widen policy summary visibility

Vendored mux client/pool:
- Add #![allow(clippy::large_futures)] with explanatory comments — the
  deeply nested async call chains in the mux protocol produce large
  futures that are not worth individually Box::pin-wrapping

wezterm.rs:
- Box::pin two inner async calls (get_pane_direction, get_text) that
  clippy flagged as oversized futures when nested inside their trait
  wrapper Box::pin calls

workflows/engine.rs:
- Widen WorkflowStepPolicyDecision, WorkflowStepPolicySummary, and
  policy_summary_decision_is_allow from pub(crate) to pub so they can
  be used from the main binary crate's why/audit rendering code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
